originalTitle: Social Security’s COLA could be 4.7% in 2027 as inflation hits the highest level in 3 years
summary: A total of 44% of older Americans depend on Social Security for all of their income, according to the Senior Citizens League.
content: A total of 44% of older Americans depend on Social Security for all of their income, according to the Senior Citizens League.
chineseTitle: 由于通货膨胀达到3年来的最高水平，2027年社会保障的COLA可能为4.7%
chineseSummary: 根据老年人联盟的数据，共有 44% 的美国老年人的所有收入都依赖社会保障。
chineseContent: 根据老年人联盟的数据，共有 44% 的美国老年人的所有收入都依赖社会保障。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
